name: accountant_meeting_06

input.subject: Tax Preparation Meeting Scheduled
input.snippet: Your tax preparation meeting has been scheduled...
input.body_text:
Hi David,

Your tax preparation meeting has been scheduled:

MEETING DETAILS

Date: Monday, March 2, 2026
Time: 4:00 PM
Location: My office or Video Call (your choice)

Office Address:
Park Accounting Services
555 Main Street, Suite 300
Sunnyvale, CA 94086

Video Call: Zoom link will be sent if preferred

Please bring or upload in advance:
- W-2s from all employers
- 1099 forms
- Last year's tax return
- Mortgage interest statements (1098)
- Property tax bills
- Charitable donation receipts

Upload documents securely: https://parkaccounting.com/upload

Let me know if you have any questions before our meeting.

Best,
Linda Park, CPA
Park Accounting Services
(408) 555-8901

events.title: Tax Preparation Meeting - Linda Park CPA
events.location: Park Accounting Services, 555 Main Street, Suite 300, Sunnyvale, CA 94086

notes: Accountant meeting with option for in-person or video call
